creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Santhosh Raju from comment #7)

Thank you for that Santhosh

`make validate` in security/vuxml does most/all of the syntactical verifications that committers do, so if it passes, just let us know :)

the package list for our firefox packages may need additions (i'm not completely sure of all the variations we have). 

Loop in gecko (and cc Jan) on the above question
